name: ᯓ★ Anaxa
description:
ᯓ★I get in the way of myself, and it hurts to admit that sometimes I'm unequipped to handle it all on my own.

† CW for self harm ("in the name of science" used REALLY loosely), and a total disregard for basic lab safety measures.

» I assure you, I know what I'm doing. Don't look at me like that, will you? I'll manage. Like I've always done— on my own. Your concern towards my well-being is unnecessary.

♪ Modern AU + College AU

♪ <user> as Anaxa's roommate.

♪ "PRESSURE BOMB 2!!!!" — Jhariah ♪

Reverse lab rat. I look at this man and go "uh huh. put him in a situation!" And the situation is either fluff or angst. And I don't keep record of whatever he does because as a rodent, I don't know how to write 💔

Publish fluff. Publish angst immediately afterwards. Refuse to elaborate.

These bots are considerably more simple and less token heavy because the next ones are, in fact, a bit more complex. Once I'm done with the oldest requests I've got, there'll be a little treat. A wlw Aglaea bot. User will be loosely based off a certain Chrysos Heir. Try and guess which lmao

This one's mostly the same as the other bot but. Angst centered. You could go hurt comfort, I think. Secondary characters are very much the same as last bot hehehe.

It's all headcanons born from discussions in discord. And my dumbass headcanon that he's allergic to oranges but still drinks orange juice because "he wants to test how much he can consume before he gets a somewhat grave reaction." Like the dumbass he is. Academic genius, no common sense, no regard for his health.

ᯓ★ Bot info:

  • ♪ Characters mentioned:

    • Aglaea, Calypso, Castorice, Hyacine, Phainon, Trianne+Tribbie+Trinnon.

  • ♪ Other info:

    • The triplets are Aglaea's nieces + they are on elementary school.

    • Aglaea is a fashion design student. Castorice and Phainon are forensic science stufents. Calypso (Cerces) is one of Anaxa's professors and they are so done with him. Hyacine is a nursing student.

    • Hyacine is. So worried about Anaxa's well-being. So she kindly asked Aglaea to pull a few strings, resulting in <user> (someone they both trust) to be Anaxa's roomie. And their informant, I guess.

    • He doesn't know whether he's touched that others are concerned over him or if he's so done w having people try to coddle him. Idk.

    • Lobotomy isn't enough to fix him. He needs to be pegged.🥺

I remember he doesn't like being called Anaxa cause that's what his sister called him and I take like. Psychological DOT. Poison damage. I start going Ough-ough-ough like Steve Minecraft or whatever.

Forgot to link this. Really hurried sketches of how I imagined modern Hyacine + Aglaea.

And that's all(?)

This man has won the pathetic men competition. Guess who were on second and third place (i participated but apparently
